What This build-and-test.yml do

Every time you or your team members push code to the main branch, GitHub will automatically:

Spin up a temporary server.

Download your code.

Install Java 17 and run your Spring Boot tests (mvn clean install).

Install Node 18 and build your React app.

Show a green checkmark ✅ on GitHub if everything works, or a red cross ❌ if someone pushed broken code.
